archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Esports / Arcade Basketball Vibe)
emotional_tone: High energy, competitive, elite, tracking progression

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense and compact control-room grid (Mode B). Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.surface_style: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). 1px border-border/40 on components, minimal border-radius (rounded-sm or rounded-none).

animations.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,215,0,0.15)] for interactive cards.
animations.buttons: Active scale down, hover background lightens slightly.
animations.tracing_beam: Use for high-tier upgrades or active tabs. 1px glowing edge.
animations.marquee: Sports ticker style at the top (react-fast-marquee) for latest game result or total XP.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD700] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none hover:bg-[#F2CC00]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FFD700]/50 text-[#FFD700] hover:bg-[#FFD700]/10 rounded-none
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 hover:border-[#FFD700]/50 hover:text-[#FFD700]

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.player_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1A1A1A] to-[#0A0A0A] border-t-2 border-[#FFD700] relative

tables.game_log: w-full text-left text-sm whitespace-nowrap tabular-nums. Header: uppercase text-xs text-white/50 border-b border-white/20 pb-3. Rows: border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors.

charts.usage: AreaChart for stat trends (uses #FFD700 with gradient fill), RadarChart for Player Build stats (fills with #00F0FF at 20% opacity), BarChart for XP breakdown.

background_textures.description: Abstract neon gold and black grid. Use with opacity-20 and mix-blend-overlay on the main dashboard background to give an esports vibe.

player_silhouettes.description: Man dribbling basketball in the dark. Use as the background for the main 'Player Build' summary card. Apply bg-black/50 overlay.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page interactive application using React and Tailwind.
Implement the UI mimicking an NBA 2K MyCareer progression dashboard.
Use a dark, high-contrast theme (Pure Black, Dark Gray, with striking Gold #FFD700 accents).
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Import 'Teko' for headings, 'Manrope' for body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers.
Create 4 main areas/tabs: Overview (Hero/Stats/Charts), Game Log (Table & Add Game Modal), Attributes (Upgrade Panels), Badges (Tiered Upgrades).
In the Game Log modal, auto-calculate XP based on inputted stats (PTS, REB, AST, etc.), applying difficulty multipliers, event types (Win/Loss), and double-double/triple-double bonuses.
In Attributes, categorize into Finishing, Shooting, Playmaking, Defense, Rebounding, Physicals. Implement tiered costs logic (50, 75, 100, 125, 225).
In Badges, implement Bronze (50), Silver (75), Gold (100), HOF (225), Legend (500) upgrades.
Manage global state for Total XP, Shared XP Balance, and Games Array.
Use 'recharts' for generating charts (Line/Area for stats over time, Radar for player build overall rating).
Use the provided image assets in 'media_assets' for the player card and background overlays to reinforce the arcade/esports aesthetic.
Ensure the layout is highly dense and tabular where needed, like a real sports analytics dashboard.
Use lucide-react for icons (e.g., Trophy, Target, Activity, Flame, ChevronUp).
